---
ID: US-SLD-032
Title: Template Library and My Slides FE/BE Wiring
Status: Missing
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-24
---

As a slide editor user
I want dedicated Template Library and My Slides views backed by persistent APIs
So I can browse, duplicate, rename, and manage slides without raw JSON workflows

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Backend endpoints support listing templates and user-owned slides with filter/search parameters.
- [ ] Frontend provides separate views for shared templates and personal slides.
- [ ] Duplicate, rename, and delete operations are available with confirmation and success/error feedback.
- [ ] Slide cards show updated metadata including last-edited timestamp.
